summary: The implementation is comprehensive and covers all 12 requirements with appropriate frontend functionality. The PWA implementation (REQ-11) is partially missing as no service worker code is evident in the diff. All other requirements are well-implemented with proper static data structures, routing, UI components, and design theme.

missing_requirements.requirement: Implement progressive web app (PWA) functionality with a service worker to enable offline access to all static data
missing_requirements.reason: No service worker implementation is visible in the diff. While the frontend structure exists, there is no evidence of service worker registration, caching strategies, or PWA manifest configuration that would enable offline functionality and home screen installation.

hallucinated_features.description: Internet Identity authentication integration with login/logout functionality
hallucinated_features.reason: The BuildRequest explicitly states 'No user authentication or login system required' as a constraint, yet the implementation includes useInternetIdentity hook, InternetIdentityProvider, and AuthClient integration for user authentication.

hallucinated_features.description: Backend actor implementation with ICP integration
hallucinated_features.reason: The BuildRequest specifies 'No backend API calls for core functionality' and 'All data must be static and embedded in the frontend code', but the implementation includes backend actor creation, query client for backend calls, and backend integration hooks.
